title: SRC
body:
# SRC   
### English/英语
This is an integration package based on Redstone and creation, the main content for the survival of the creation of Redstone circuit, to create machines related to red stone, you can experience vanilla fun functions. In addition, there is a bot provided by Carpet, which provides a lot of power support for your machine   
### 简体中文/Chinese   
这是一个基于生电的整合包，主要内容为生存中创建红石电路，创造与红石有关的机器，你可以体验原版的乐趣功能。此外，还有Carpet提供bot，为你的机器提供大量的动力支持，这整合包主要目的是与自己的服务端所搭配，加入QQ群快捷反馈748826412
